attributes.action: Change law  to allow new  Oil and Gas Development in the UK  Waters
attributes.additional_details:
So that the UK can be self sufficient in energy needs .    Its  folly to rely on being supplied from abroad when we have lots of the stuff under our own control 

Renewables are important - and will take over in time - but meantime_

World politics -  Middle East Wars, Trump Tariffs, Russian aggression  - let alone the carbon costs of importation  - too much of a gamble .

You may  remember the 3 day week , power cuts and lay offs ,  
Petrol Rationing

Let the electorate decide
attributes.background: To allow it to take place

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
